title: Progress status with multiples miroring columns from different views
excerpt:
Hi, 
I have a view where I group mirrored columns from different views. I want to display the progress status of all columns once the status has turned green (completed, finished). Do I need to create a formula for this?…

posts.author: AlexandreD (DRAGUT)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I have a view where I group mirrored columns from different views. I want to display the progress status of all columns once the status has turned green (completed, finished). Do I need to create a formula for this? Does the column already exist? Thank you.
